prompt:
Reference image role: same as previous blog thumbnails — Chinese ink-wash painting fused with one soft modern tech metaphor, warm parchment-green background, low contrast, painterly soft edges. PRESERVE this style exactly.

Create a 16:9 blog thumbnail for article "ZeRO 参数分片与 AllGather 流程分析". NO text.

Subject: Ink-wash painting of an ancient scroll painting being split into four equal vertical strips, each strip drifting separately in mist, then converging back together along faint golden #C0A35D dotted lines (suggesting parameter sharding then gathering). Painted in soft grey-black brush strokes. Small firefly cyan #9CF0BD glow at the gather convergence point.

Style: Brush-painted, atmospheric, low contrast. Same warm parchment-green background.

Color HEX: ink black #1a1d1c, mist grey #3a4540, paper warm #2a3128, cyan #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D.

Avoid: real text, characters, neon, red, purple, cartoonish, photographic, modern.
